texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Over 500 hours of videos are uploaded to YouTube every minute.
texts.text: Over 500 hours of videos are uploaded to YouTube every minute.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Viewers often struggle to extract key information from lengthy videos.
texts.text: Viewers often struggle to extract key information from lengthy videos.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Manual skimming is inefficient and time-consuming.
texts.text: Manual skimming is inefficient and time-consuming.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o Accurate answers to specific user queries
texts.text: o Accurate answers to specific user queries

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Automatically generate summaries for YouTube videos.
texts.text: Automatically generate summaries for YouTube videos.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Provide precise answers to user-defined questions.
texts.text: Provide precise answers to user-defined questions.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Utilize Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to enhance contextual relevance.
texts.text: Utilize Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to enhance contextual relevance.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Vector embeddings for efficient information retrieval
texts.text: Vector embeddings for efficient information retrieval

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ▪ Summarization: Models are evaluated at different temperature values for response variability and coherence.
texts.text: Summarization: Models are evaluated at different temperature values for response variability and coherence.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ▪ Q & A: tested using top K (number of chunks retrieved) and Cosine threshold (filters relevant content based on similarity score).
texts.text: Q & A: tested using top K (number of chunks retrieved) and Cosine threshold (filters relevant content based on similarity score).

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Model Performance Across Cosine threshold (Q & A)
texts.text: Model Performance Across Cosine threshold (Q & A)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · GPT-4 mini & GPT-3.5 Turbo lead in Q&A, with BERT scores > 0.90 at higher K values.
texts.text: GPT-4 mini & GPT-3.5 Turbo lead in Q&A, with BERT scores > 0.90 at higher K values.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Claude Sonnet shows stable performance across temperatures, maintaining ~0.85 BERT scores.
texts.text: Claude Sonnet shows stable performance across temperatures, maintaining ~0.85 BERT scores.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · As K increases the performance also increases consistently for all models and there is no particular trend for cosine threshold.
texts.text: As K increases the performance also increases consistently for all models and there is no particular trend for cosine threshold.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Dataset: ClarityClips/youtube-video-summarization (Hugging Face). Q&A Benchmark: Manually curated synthetic dataset.
texts.text: Dataset: ClarityClips/youtube-video-summarization (Hugging Face). Q&A Benchmark: Manually curated synthetic dataset.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Metric: BERTScore for evaluating relevance and quality.
texts.text: Metric: BERTScore for evaluating relevance and quality.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This experiment demonstrates the effectiveness of combining RetrievalAugmented Generation (RAG) with transformer-based models for summarizing and querying YouTube videos. Fine-tuning retrieval parameters like topK and cosine similarity significantly enhances Q&A performance. Stable summarization is achievable through careful temperature control, while retrieval thresholds influence both efficiency and accuracy.
texts.text: This experiment demonstrates the effectiveness of combining RetrievalAugmented Generation (RAG) with transformer-based models for summarizing and querying YouTube videos. Fine-tuning retrieval parameters like topK and cosine similarity significantly enhances Q&A performance. Stable summarization is achievable through careful temperature control, while retrieval thresholds influence both efficiency and accuracy.

texts.text: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP TasksPatrick Lewis, Ethan Perez, Aleksandra Piktus, et al.arXiv preprint arXiv:2005.11401 (2020)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Document Q&A with ChromaDB - Google Generative AI Documentation.
texts.text: Document Q&A with ChromaDB - Google Generative AI Documentation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Transcript Extraction: Fetching video transcripts using the YouTube API.
texts.text: Transcript Extraction: Fetching video transcripts using the YouTube API.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Chunking + Embeddings: Splitting transcripts into manageable chunks and converting the chunks into vector representations using embeddings.
texts.text: Chunking + Embeddings: Splitting transcripts into manageable chunks and converting the chunks into vector representations using embeddings.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: · ChromaDB: Storing vectors in a local vector database for effectively retrieving the most relevant chunks for a query.
texts.text: · ChromaDB: Storing vectors in a local vector database for effectively retrieving the most relevant chunks for a query.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Transformer Models: Using large language models to summarize the video content and generate answers to user questions.
texts.text: Transformer Models: Using large language models to summarize the video content and generate answers to user questions.
